summary: Iteration 25 - Page Headers Tab Testing COMPLETE. All 18 features tested and verified: Admin Page Headers tab exists, shows rows for Homepage/About/Transformations/Media/Blog with visibility toggles for Media(ON) and Blog(OFF), Flagship Programs section shows all 6 flagship programs, font controls (color picker, font dropdown, size dropdown, B/I buttons) work, 'Apply Homepage Style to All' button exists, settings save correctly with toast confirmation, /blog page accessible when directly visited but hidden from nav, hero sections on all pages read from page_heroes settings, Read Full Bio links to /about#bio, footer background consistent #1a1a1a on all pages.
critical_code_review_comments: PageHeadersTab.jsx: Well-structured with StyleCell component for font controls, STATIC_PAGES array for Homepage/About/Transformations/Media/Blog rows, visibility toggles via toggleKey prop, applyToAll function correctly copies home styles to all pages and programs
BlogPage.jsx: Correctly reads hero from settings?.page_heroes?.blog with applyHeroStyle utility function, footer uses #1a1a1a background
MediaPage.jsx: Properly reads hero from settings?.page_heroes?.media with same applyHeroStyle pattern
AboutPage.jsx: Hero reads from page_heroes.about, bio section has id='bio' for scroll linking
HeroSection.jsx: Supports page_heroes.home style overrides via finalTitleStyle and finalSubtitleStyle
Header.jsx: Blog link conditional on settings?.blog_page_visible, MEDIA always shown (line 125-127)
models.py: page_heroes is Dict type, media_page_visible and blog_page_visible are boolean fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Page Headers tab fully functional. page_heroes Dict stores hero settings per page key (home, about, transformations, media, blog, program_2, etc.). Media visible toggle is ON, Blog visible toggle is OFF. All hero sections read from centralized page_heroes settings. Phone OTP is MOCKED.

admin_page_headers_tab.hero_row_blog: PASS - data-testid='hero-row-blog' with visibility toggle OFF
admin_page_headers_tab.apply_homepage_style_button: PASS - 'Apply Homepage Style to All' button found
admin_page_headers_tab.settings_saved_toast: PASS - 'Settings saved!' toast appears on save

visibility_toggles.blog_hidden_from_nav: PASS - Blog not in navigation menu
visibility_toggles.media_shown_in_nav: PASS - Media shown in navigation menu

about_page.bio_section: PASS - id='bio' section exists for scroll linking

homepage.hero_title: PASS - 'Divine Iris Healing' with Cinzel font
homepage.supports_page_heroes_home: PASS - HeroSection uses page_heroes.home style overrides

backend_api.settings_preserves_fields: PASS - Partial update preserves other fields
